content.json:
## Pipeline Overview
Real-time view of the Transpose translation pipeline health and throughput.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.pipeline.stage_duration"
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage)
| summarize avg_duration = avg(value), p95_duration = percentile(value, 95) by stage, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
| project timestamp, stage, avg_duration, p95_duration
content.title: Pipeline Stage Duration Over Time
Pipeline Counters

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.errors"
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage)
| summarize error_count = sum(value) by stage
| order by error_count desc
content.title: Errors by Pipeline Stage

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name has "pipeline" or name has "translate" or name has "ingest"
| summarize active_runs = dcount(operation_Id), avg_duration = avg(duration), success_rate = round(100.0 * countif(success == true) / count(), 1) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Active Pipeline Runs (from Traces/Requests)

content.json:
## Translation Performance
OpenAI GPT-4o usage, translation throughput, and cost estimation.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.openai.tokens_used"
| extend token_type = tostring(customDimensions.type)
| summarize total_tokens = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h), token_type
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: OpenAI Token Usage Over Time

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.pipeline.chunks_translated"
| summarize chunks_per_hour = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Chunks Translated Per Hour

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.pipeline.stage_duration"
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage)
| where stage == "translate"
| summarize p50 = percentile(value, 50), p90 = percentile(value, 90), p99 = percentile(value, 99), avg_val = avg(value) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Translation Stage Latency Distribution

content.query:
// Token cost estimation: $2.50/1M input tokens, $10.00/1M output tokens
let input_tokens = customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.openai.tokens_used"
| where tostring(customDimensions.type) == "prompt" or tostring(customDimensions.type) == "input"
| summarize total_input = sum(value);
let output_tokens = customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.openai.tokens_used"
| where tostring(customDimensions.type) == "completion" or tostring(customDimensions.type) == "output"
| summarize total_output = sum(value);
let all_tokens = customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.openai.tokens_used"
| summarize total_all = sum(value);
input_tokens | extend d=1
| join kind=fullouter (output_tokens | extend d=1) on d
| join kind=fullouter (all_tokens | extend d=1) on d
| project
    Input_Tokens = coalesce(total_input, 0.0),
    Output_Tokens = coalesce(total_output, 0.0),
    Total_Tokens = coalesce(total_all, 0.0),
    Input_Cost_USD = round(coalesce(total_input, 0.0) / 1000000.0 * 2.50, 4),
    Output_Cost_USD = round(coalesce(total_output, 0.0) / 1000000.0 * 10.00, 4),
    Total_Cost_USD = round(coalesce(total_input, 0.0) / 1000000.0 * 2.50 + coalesce(total_output, 0.0) / 1000000.0 * 10.00, 4)
content.title: Token Cost Estimation (GPT-4o)

content.json:
## OCR & Quality
Document Intelligence OCR throughput and confidence monitoring.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.ocr.pages_processed"
| summarize pages = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Pages Processed Over Time

content.query:
let total = customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.ocr.pages_processed"
| summarize total_pages = sum(value);
let low_conf = customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.ocr.low_confidence_pages"
| summarize low_conf_pages = sum(value);
total | extend d=1
| join kind=fullouter (low_conf | extend d=1) on d
| project
    Total_Pages = coalesce(total_pages, 0.0),
    Low_Confidence_Pages = coalesce(low_conf_pages, 0.0),
    Low_Confidence_Ratio = iff(coalesce(total_pages, 0.0) > 0, round(coalesce(low_conf_pages, 0.0) / coalesce(total_pages, 0.0) * 100.0, 1), 0.0)
content.title: OCR Confidence Summary

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.pipeline.stage_duration"
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage)
| where stage == "ocr"
| summarize avg_duration = avg(value), p95_duration = percentile(value, 95) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: OCR Stage Duration

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.errors"
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage)
| where stage == "ocr"
| extend error_type = tostring(customDimensions.error_type)
| summarize error_count = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h), error_type
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: OCR Failures / Retries

content.json:
## Infrastructure Health
Container App resources, PostgreSQL, and dependency performance.

content.title: Container App Process Metrics

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where type == "PostgreSQL" or target has "postgres" or target has "psql"
| summarize
    call_count = count(),
    avg_duration_ms = avg(duration),
    p95_duration_ms = percentile(duration, 95),
    failure_rate = round(100.0 * countif(success == false) / count(), 1)
  by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: PostgreSQL Query Performance

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize
    call_count = count(),
    avg_duration_ms = round(avg(duration), 1),
    failure_count = countif(success == false),
    success_rate = round(100.0 * countif(success == true) / count(), 1)
  by type, target
| order by call_count desc
content.title: Dependency Call Summary

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize
    total = count(),
    success_count = countif(success == true),
    failure_count = countif(success == false),
    avg_duration_ms = round(avg(duration), 1)
  by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| extend success_rate = round(100.0 * success_count / total, 1)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: HTTP Request Success/Failure Rate

content.json:
## Errors & Alerts
Exception tracking, failure analysis, and recommended alert configuration.

content.query:
exceptions
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize exception_count = count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), type
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Exception Timeline

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "transpose.errors"
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage), error_type = tostring(customDimensions.error_type)
| summarize error_count = sum(value) by stage, error_type
| order by error_count desc
content.title: Top Errors by Stage and Type

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where success == false
| summarize failure_count = count() by type, target, resultCode
| order by failure_count desc
| take 20
content.title: Failed Dependency Calls

content.json:
## Recommended Alert Rules

Set up these alerts in **Azure Monitor → Alerts → Create alert rule** against your Application Insights resource:

| Alert | Signal | Condition | Threshold | Frequency |
|-------|--------|-----------|-----------|----------|
| **High Error Rate** | Custom metric: `transpose.errors` | Total > threshold in 15 min | > 10 errors/15m | Every 5 min |
| **OCR Low Confidence Spike** | Custom metric: `transpose.ocr.low_confidence_pages` | Total > threshold in 1h | > 10 pages/hour | Every 15 min |
| **Token Usage Spike** | Custom metric: `transpose.openai.tokens_used` | Total > threshold in 1h | > 500,000 tokens/hour | Every 15 min |
| **Stage Duration Regression** | Custom metric: `transpose.pipeline.stage_duration` | Average > threshold in 15 min | > 300s (5 min) | Every 5 min |
| **Dependency Failure** | Dependencies failure rate | Percentage > threshold | > 5% failure rate | Every 5 min |
| **Container App Restart** | Container restart count | Count > 0 | > 2 restarts/hour | Every 15 min |

### KQL for Custom Log Alert: High Error Rate
```kusto
customMetrics
| where name == "transpose.errors"
| where timestamp > ago(15m)
| summarize total_errors = sum(value)
| where total_errors > 10
```

### KQL for Custom Log Alert: OCR Confidence Degradation
```kusto
let total = customMetrics | where name == "transpose.ocr.pages_processed" | where timestamp > ago(1h) | summarize t = sum(value);
let low = customMetrics | where name == "transpose.ocr.low_confidence_pages" | where timestamp > ago(1h) | summarize l = sum(value);
total | extend d=1 | join (low | extend d=1) on d
| where t > 0 and (l / t) > 0.2
```

### KQL for Custom Log Alert: Token Budget Exceeded
```kusto
customMetrics
| where name == "transpose.openai.tokens_used"
| where timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize total_tokens = sum(value)
| where total_tokens > 500000
```
